caption: The video opens with a wide shot of a large, semicircular assembly hall filled with people seated in tiered rows. The room features high ceilings, large windows, and dark walls. The scene then shifts to a closer shot of a man, Narendra Modi, speaking from a podium. He is wearing a light-colored Nehru jacket over a pale shirt and glasses. He stands behind a wooden podium equipped with two microphones. The background consists of a textured, dark green stone wall with geometric patterns. He uses hand gestures while speaking, raising his right hand in the air and later pointing upward with his right index finger. The camera remains focused on him from the waist up for the remainder of the clip, capturing his expressions and gestures as he addresses the audience.
